mapper.sql: id , symbol, full_name, asset_type, current_price, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset_info (symbol, full_name, asset_type, current_price) VALUES (#{entity.symbol}, #{entity.fullName}, #{entity.assetType}, #{entity.currentPrice})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM asset_info WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM asset_info WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO asset_info (symbol, full_name, asset_type, current_price) VALUES
(#{item.symbol}, #{item.fullName}, #{item.assetType}, IFNULL(#{item.currentPrice}, 0))
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE full_name = VALUES(full_name), asset_type = VALUES(asset_type)
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM asset_info WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND ( symbol LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY symbol ASC LIMIT 50
